name: iam-samples-php
description: IdentityHub PHP integration sample with SQLite Contact Management

scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const exec=require('child_process').execSync; const php=fs.existsSync('tools/php/php.exe')?'\"tools/php/php.exe\"':'php'; exec(php + ' start.php', {stdio: 'inherit'});"

author: Operlity
